summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JWT authentication system and admin panel for Al-Haram OS. All authentication flows working perfectly including login, registration, protected routes, and admin CRUD operations. Backend APIs 100% functional and frontend UI fully integrated.
passed_tests: User registration API (/api/auth/register) working correctly
Admin login API (/api/auth/login) working with provided credentials (admin@haram.gov.sa)
JWT token authentication system functioning properly
Get current user API (/api/auth/me) working with valid tokens
Invalid login attempts correctly rejected with 401 status
Admin gates CRUD operations (POST/PUT/DELETE) working
Admin plazas CRUD operations (POST/PUT/DELETE) working
Admin alerts creation working
Admin users management endpoint accessible
Unauthorized access to admin endpoints correctly rejected (403 status)
Login page displays correctly with email/password form
Registration tab works and shows all required fields
Protected routes redirect to login when not authenticated
Admin login with credentials works and redirects to dashboard
Dashboard loads correctly after authentication
Sound toggle button appears and functions on dashboard
Admin page (/admin) accessible for admin users after login
Admin page has all required tabs: Gates, Plazas, Mataf, Users
Admin page header displays correctly ('لوحة الإدارة')
Dashboard stat cards display correctly (4 cards found)
Arabic RTL layout working properly throughout the application
JWT session management working (expired sessions redirect to login)
All 35 backend API endpoints tested with 100% success rate
